title: Restless Winds
description: Tatanka, with his loyal horse companion, Comanche, faces challenges when he falls in love with a settler woman.
quote: You will find me where the moon and sun cross paths in the shadows of the great bear.
altHero: white settler woman embraces Tatanka, a Native American man
alt1: Tatanka and his horse Comanche, the settler woman speaks to him from behind
alt4: Tatanka and his settler woman holding a baby
